block_01: MACD is by right one of the most popular indicators out there. It is relatively easy to set up and use, and it offers tremendous flexibility to those who decide to add this tool to their trading system.
block_02: This indicator can help you spot emerging trends, find optimal entry points and close your deals at the right moment. More than that, it can do all that in a simple and concise fashion.
block_03: Read the full article to learn about three different ways to use MACD in trading.
